title: Downtown lighting overhaul is now live
textdection: Night scenes now feel sharper with neon bounce, softer fog, and cleaner reflections across the main district.

title: Street circuit weekend opens on Friday

title: Global launcher maintenance notice
textdection: This announcement is shared across every server because it affects the launcher itself rather than a single server.
